<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√ī-sń≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√ļ-sŠĻ≥Őān]][[ja:śąäÁĒ≥]][[ko:Ž¨īžč† (ÍįĄžßÄ)]][[vi:MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:BŇćÕė-sin]][[zh-yue:śąäÁĒ≥]][[zh:śąäÁĒ≥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√ī-sń≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√ļ-sŠĻ≥Őān]][[ja:śąäÁĒ≥]][[ko:Ž¨īžč† (ÍįĄžßÄ)]][[vi:MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:BŇćÕė-sin]][[zh-yue:śąäÁĒ≥]][[zh:śąäÁĒ≥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√ī-sń≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√ļ-sŠĻ≥Őān]][[ja:śąäÁĒ≥]][[ko:Ž¨īžč† (ÍįĄžßÄ)]][[vi:MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:BŇćÕė-sin]][[zh-yue:śąäÁĒ≥]][[zh:śąäÁĒ≥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=śąäÁĒ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√Ļshńďn|w=wu-shen|mi=u‚ĀĶ‚ĀĶ  ā…ôn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…źu  ā…źn|mc=m…ôu  āin|oc-bs=m…ô  āin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{śčľťü≥|w√Ļshńďn|qq=}}„ÄĀ{{ś≥®ťü≥|„Ą®ňč „Ąē„Ą£|qq=}}„ÄĀ{{lang-ko|Ž¨īžč†|qq=}}„ÄĀ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ŚÖ≠ŚćĀŚĻ≤śĒĮ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ŚĻ≤śĒĮ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|šłĀśú™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|Ś∑ĪťÖČ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|śąä|1=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|lt=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|2=ja|3=śąä|4=zh|5=śąä|1=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (śąä)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (ÁĒ≥)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang metal; according to the principle of {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=phase generation|1=Aioi}} (earth producing metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Monkey (śąäÁĒ≥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√Ļshńďn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (Ž¨īžč†)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Monkey (śąäÁĒ≥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√Ļshńďn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: „Ā§„Ā°„Āģ„Āą„Āē„āč (tsuchinoe-saru)
***Onyomi: „Āľ„Āč„Āģ„Āē„āč (boka-no-saru)
***Onyomi: „Āľ„Āó„āď (boshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): musin
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn

-->
==Years of Yang Earth Monkey==
A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Wushen'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|AD 48|en|AD 48|WD=Q30957|lt=48 AD|1=AD 48}}
* {{ill|AD 108|en|AD 108|WD=Q24431|lt=108 AD|1=AD 108}}
* {{ill|168|en|168|WD=Q24916|lt=168 AD|1=168}}
* {{ill|228|en|228|WD=Q32995|lt=228 AD|1=228}}
* {{ill|288|en|288|WD=Q32499|lt=288 AD|1=288}}
* {{ill|348|en|348|WD=Q32633|lt=348 AD|1=348}}
* {{ill|408|en|408|WD=Q30141|lt=408 AD|1=408}}
* {{ill|468|en|468|WD=Q30823|lt=468 AD|1=468}}
* {{ill|528|en|528|WD=Q32908|lt=528 AD|1=528}}
* {{ill|588|en|588|WD=Q32160|lt=588 AD|1=588}}
* {{ill|648|en|648|WD=Q30618|lt=648 AD|1=648}}
* {{ill|708|en|708|WD=Q23511|lt=708 AD|1=708}}
* {{ill|768|en|768|WD=Q29961|lt=768 AD|1=768}}
* {{ill|828|en|828|WD=Q30375|lt=828 AD|1=828}}
* {{ill|AD 888|en|AD 888|WD=Q29956|lt=888 AD|1=AD 888}}
* {{ill|948|en|948|WD=Q24318|lt=948 AD|1=948}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|1008|en|1008|WD=Q19235|lt=1008 AD|1=1008}}
* {{ill|1068|en|1068|WD=Q19421|lt=1068 AD|1=1068}}
* {{ill|1128|en|1128|WD=Q23746|lt=1128 AD|1=1128}}
* {{ill|1188|en|1188|WD=Q19732|lt=1188 AD|1=1188}}
* {{ill|1248|en|1248|WD=Q5483|lt=1248 AD|1=1248}}
* {{ill|1308|en|1308|WD=Q5723|lt=1308 AD|1=1308}}
* {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368 AD|1=1368}}
* {{ill|1428|en|1428|WD=Q6315|lt=1428 AD|1=1428}}
* {{ill|1488|en|1488|WD=Q4853|lt=1488 AD|1=1488}}
* {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548 AD|1=1548}}
* {{ill|1608|en|1608|WD=Q6758|lt=1608 AD|1=1608}}
* {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668 AD|1=1668}}
* {{ill|1728|en|1728|WD=Q6947|lt=1728 AD|1=1728}}
* {{ill|1788|en|1788|WD=Q7765|lt=1788 AD|1=1788}}
* {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848 AD|1=1848}}
* {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908 AD|1=1908}}
* {{ill|1968|en|1968|WD=Q2644|lt=1968 AD|1=1968}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|2028|en|2028|WD=Q12809|lt=2028 AD|1=2028}}
* {{ill|2088 AD|ja|2088ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2088 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2080ŚĻīšĽ£|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2148 AD|ja|2148ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2148 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22šłĖÁīÄ|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2208 AD|ja|2208ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2208 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22šłĖÁīÄ|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2268 AD|ja|2268ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2268 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23šłĖÁīÄ|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2328 AD|ja|2328ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2328 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2388 AD|ja|2388ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2388 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2448 AD|ja|2448ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2448 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2508 AD|ja|2508ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2508 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2568 AD|ja|2568ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2568 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2628 AD|ja|2628ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2628 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2688 AD|ja|2688ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2688 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2748 AD|ja|2748ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2748 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2808 AD|ja|2808ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2808 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2868 AD|ja|2868ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2868 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2928 AD|ja|2928ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2928 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2988 AD|ja|2988ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2988 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 41 (1908) ‚Äď the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|śąäÁĒ≥Ť©Ēśõł|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Q17641335|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}.
* In 1968 ‚Äď the Tet Offensive during the {{ill|Vietnam War|en|Vietnam War|WD=Q8740|lt=Vietnam War|1=Vietnam War}}. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|SŠĽĪ kiŠĽán TŠļŅt MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey==
In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|Ś£¨|1=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|lt=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|2=ja|3=Ś£¨|4=zh|5=Ś£¨|1=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|šłĀ|1=Hinoto (šłĀ)|lt=Hinoto (šłĀ)|2=ja|3=šłĀ|4=zh|5=šłĀ|1=Hinoto (šłĀ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (šłĀ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=RisshŇę|1=Liqiu}} to the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro|1=Bailu (solar term)}}].)

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey==
=== Date Selection ===
The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|TengitenjŇć|ja|Ś§©šłÄŚ§©šłä|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TengitenjŇć|ja_comment=Ś§©šłÄÁ•ě|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=Ś§©šłÄÁ•ě|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

== Related Articles ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:P√™ng-ch√ļn]]
[[zh-yue:šłôŚ≠ź]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Monkey|qq=ja|śąäÁĒ≥|version=98657993|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:B√ģng-cŠĻ≥ŐĄde]]
[[nds:Feuer-R√∂ttvi]]
[[de:Yang Earth Monkey]]

[[ja:śąäÁĒ≥]]
[[zh:śąäÁĒ≥]]
[[ko:Ž¨īžč† (ÍįĄžßÄ)]]
[[fr:Singe de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Affe]]

[[af:Vuurrat (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Ratteen]]
[[en:Fire Rat]]
[[fr:Rat de feushak]]
[[it:Bing-chŠĻ≥ŐĀid]]

[[ko:Ž≥Ďžěź]]
[[vi:B√≠nh T√Ĺ]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[zh:šłôŚ≠ź]]
[[ar:Yang Earth Monkey]]

<!--Yang Earth Monkey--><!--Yang Earth Monkey-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Mu√ī-sń≠ng]]
[[hak:V√ļ-sŠĻ≥Őān]]
[[vi:MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn]]
[[za:Fouhsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:BŇćÕė-sin]]
[[zh-yue:śąäÁĒ≥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Mu√ī-sń≠ng]]
[[hak:V√ļ-sŠĻ≥Őān]]
[[vi:MŠļ≠u Th√Ęn]]
[[za:Fouhsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:BŇćÕė-sin]]
[[zh-yue:śąäÁĒ≥]]
{{wikidata link|Q904781}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
